description_long: This doll features a highly stylized, elongated form with a prominent, crescent-shaped headpiece or helmet that extends upward and splits at the top. The torso is narrow and angular, with exaggerated, pointed shoulders and thin, articulated arms that hang down. The lower body tapers into long, slender legs, with the rear view revealing a pronounced, curved extension resembling a tail or cloak. The silhouette is abstract and insectoid, with sharp, geometric lines and a sense of dynamic posture. The surface appears uniformly dark and matte, with no visible facial features or clothing details, giving the doll a mysterious, almost alien appearance.
description: A tall, slender doll with a crescent-shaped headpiece, angular limbs, and a dark, matte surface, evoking an abstract, insectoid figure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the split crescent headpiece, narrow torso, and symmetrical, pointed limbs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated headpiece, curved back extension, and thin, forward-angled legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full width of the headpiece, the tapering back extension, and straight legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the headpiece's length and the curvature of the lower body.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll appears to be adorned in a single-piece, sculpted bodysuit with exaggerated, angular shoulder elements and a dramatic, crescent-shaped headpiece. The design is minimalist and abstract, with no visible patterns, colors, or fabric textures, evoking a futuristic or fantasy-inspired aesthetic.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, arms hanging straight down at its sides, and legs extended downward. The torso is elongated and slightly arched, while the lower body features a pronounced, backward-curving extension.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible; the face is obscured or stylized as part of the headpiece.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered or replaced by a large, crescent-shaped helmet or headpiece.
